title: Pan-Seared Skewers with Samphire and Dried Norwegians
description: A flavorful and nutritious dish featuring pan-seared Norwegian skewers served with sautéed samphire and a side of toasted dried Norwegians. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the chopped samphire and cook for 3-4 minutes or until tender.
Add the Norway skewers to the skillet and cook for 4-5 minutes or until browned on all sides.
Transfer the skewers to a plate and cover with foil to keep warm.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil to the skillet.
Add the chopped dried Norwegians and cook for 2-3 minutes or until toasted.
Return the skewers to the skillet and serve with the sautéed samphire and toasted Norwegians.
Squeeze the lemon slice over the top and serve immediately.
